allow: PowerShell(Start-Process pwsh -ArgumentList '-NoExit','-File','scripts/auto-push.ps1' -WorkingDirectory \(Get-Location\).Path; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Get-Process pwsh | Select-Object Id, StartTime | Sort-Object StartTime | Select-Object -Last 3)

PowerShell($status = git status --porcelain; $changed = \($status -split "`n" | Where-Object { $_ }\).Count; Write-Host "Changed files: $changed"; git add -A 2>$null | Out-Null; $stamp = Get-Date -Format "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"; git commit -q -m "auto: sync $changed change\(s\) @ $stamp" 2>&1; Write-Host "commit exit: $LASTEXITCODE"; git push origin main 2>&1; Write-Host "push exit: $LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell(git add -A 2>$null | Out-Null; git commit -q -m "Add robust polling-based real-time auto-push watcher" 2>&1; Write-Host "commit exit: $LASTEXITCODE"; git push origin main 2>&1; Write-Host "push exit: $LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell(Start-Process pwsh -ArgumentList '-NoExit','-File','scripts/auto-push.ps1' -WorkingDirectory \(Get-Location\).Path; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $w = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name = 'pwsh.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'auto-push.ps1' }; Write-Host \("Running watchers: " + \($w | Measure-Object\).Count\); $w | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  PID $\($_.ProcessId\)" })

PowerShell($procs = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name = 'pwsh.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'auto-push.ps1' } | Sort-Object CreationDate; Write-Host "Found $\($procs.Count\) watcher\(s\):"; $procs | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  PID $\($_.ProcessId\) started $\($_.CreationDate\)" }; if \($procs.Count -gt 1\) { $procs | Select-Object -SkipLast 1 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "Killing older duplicate PID $\($_.ProcessId\)"; Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; $final = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name = 'pwsh.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'auto-push.ps1' }; Write-Host "Now running: $\(\($final | Measure-Object\).Count\) watcher\(s\)")

Bash(node -e "const b=require\('./src/data/books.json'\); console.log\('parsed OK, count:', b.length\); console.log\('all have primaryIntent:', b.every\(x=>x.primaryIntent\)\); console.log\('all have valid id:', b.every\(x=>x.id\)\); const ids=b.map\(x=>x.id\); console.log\('unique ids:', new Set\(ids\).size===ids.length\); console.log\('sample new:', JSON.stringify\(b.find\(x=>x.id==='clean-code'\).primaryIntent\), JSON.stringify\(b.find\(x=>x.id==='letters-from-a-stoic'\).primaryIntent\)\);")
